features.featureTitle: On the Dashboard page (/dashboard), when the stats data fails to load or the actor is not yet initialized, automatically retry/reload the data fetch without requiring the user to manually refresh the page. Implement an automatic retry mechanism (e.g. using React Query's retry and refetchInterval options, or a useEffect-based polling approach) so that the Dashboard recovers and displays data as soon as the backend actor becomes available. Remove any hard 'Reload' or manual refresh prompt and replace it with an automatic recovery flow that shows a loading indicator while retrying.
